mapper.select:
/** CmmtProgramDao.select */ select
,(select string_agg(ROLE_ID, ',') from cmmt_program_role where PROGRAM_ID = a.program_id) as role_ids from cmmt_program a where program_id = #{programId}

/** CmmtProgramDao.selectByRoleId */ SELECT b.program_id , b.role_id , b.creator_id , b.created_dt FROM cmmt_program a JOIN cmmt_program_role b ON a.program_id = b.program_id WHERE b.role_id = #{roldId}
/** CmmtProgramDao.selectTotalCount */ select count(*) as cnt from cmmt_program
